title: zinowiewia sulphurea
intro: Zinowiewia sulphurea, also known as the Yellow Passionflower, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Zinowiewia sulphurea include reducing anxiety and stress, treating insomnia and restlessness, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Zinowiewia sulphurea can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
